title: Add predict_log_proba and predict_joint_log_proba methods to all Naive Bayes fitted estimators
description:
sklearn API contract: every NB classifier provides predict_log_proba (returns log-probabilities) and predict_joint_log_proba (returns unnormalized joint log-likelihood log P(c) + log P(x|c)).

ferrolearn-bayes currently has only predict_proba on each Fitted*NB. Add the two log variants. predict_log_proba is just the log of normalized predict_proba; predict_joint_log_proba is the per-class joint log-likelihood used internally before normalization.

Affected types:
- FittedGaussianNB, FittedMultinomialNB, FittedBernoulliNB, FittedComplementNB, FittedCategoricalNB

Add unit tests asserting predict_log_proba == predict_proba.ln() (within tol) and predict_joint_log_proba shape == (n_samples, n_classes).
